reviews.review_title: The best Cinema Experience on Quest
reviews.review_description:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Perfect cinema experience on Quest 3!
This app is amazing, especially after the latest update. I had asked the developer if it was possible to integrate the web browser directly into the cinema screen instead of resizing it manually — and he made it happen in record time! The immersion is now perfect, and the dev is incredibly responsive. Thank you for this great work 👌
